tools.name: links
tools.description: Use to render the Links widget with a list of link cards. Call this when the user asks for links, websites, references, resources, reading lists, or recommended URLs, including when they ask to display links visually instead of plain text. The tool can display links provided by the user or links selected/generated by the assistant, but each link item must include `url`, `title`, and `description`. Do not call this tool when the user explicitly asks for plain text only, says not to use tools/widgets, asks only what the widget can do, or asks for something unrelated to links.
